migration_notes.BusinessRulesView: 2x useQuery (service_category_benchmarks, revenue_model_defaults) + 2x useMutation. Local optimistic edits via queryClient.setQueryData on onChange, invalidate on mutation success.
migration_notes.ReportsView: 1x useQuery (spa_menus_parsed). Action-triggered generateReports() kept as-is (not a data fetch).
migration_notes.PlanOutputView: 1x useQuery (plan_output, planId). isLoading drives existing skeleton shimmer. null data drives existing error state.
migration_notes.ServiceIntelligenceView: 3x useQuery (spa_menus_intel, spa_service_mapping, service_gap_analysis) + 2x useMutation (mapping review, gap status). runAnalysis() is an imperative action that invalidates queries after completion. Realtime removed (was imperative reload, not subscription).
migration_notes.MarketingCalendarView: 1x useQuery (marketing_calendar_2026). isLive derived from data.length > 0. Removed loading spinner (was Loader2 spinner — pre-existing, not introduced by migration).
migration_notes.BrandLayout: 1x useQuery (brand_conversation_count) with refetchInterval:60000 to maintain badge freshness. Replaced useEffect+direct supabase call.
migration_notes.ModuleAccessContext: 1x useQuery (account_module_access) replaces fetchAccess useCallback+useEffect pattern. Realtime subscription useEffect kept (WebSocket, not data fetch) — now calls queryClient.invalidateQueries instead of fetchAccess.

hook_consolidator.notes: No duplicate query keys introduced. spa_menus is queried under distinct keys (spa_menus_parsed for ReportsView, spa_menus_all for MappingView, spa_menus_intel for ServiceIntelligenceView) to preserve independent filtering. Consolidation into a shared hook is deferred to a dedicated hook-consolidator WO.

build.notes: Chunk size warnings are pre-existing Rollup advisories, not errors introduced by this migration.

notes: All 8 true violations migrated to TanStack Query. tsc=0 errors. Build exits 0. 0 true violations remain in full src/ scan. auth.tsx excluded per CLAUDE.md §B (NEVER MODIFY).
